description: The Distance From Spherical Sector node takes a point in 3D space and computes the distance from a spherical sector defined by its center, direction, radius, and angle. Then it returns the distance from that sphere.

fields.Direction: The facing direction of the sphere.
fields.Angle: The angle this point and sphere is going to be using for calculations.
fields.* ([[Type:float3|float3]]): Returns the distance from the point and the sphere compared with the point given.
